title: Moosend vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend vs AWeber. See pricing, features, ratings & which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
h1: Moosend vs AWeber: Complete Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Moosend and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering freemium models, but they cater to different user needs. Moosend focuses on unlimited sending and automation at low costs, while AWeber emphasizes simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your business.
choose_a_if: You want unlimited emails at an affordable price point starting at just $9/month
You need advanced automation workflows and A/B testing capabilities
You're scaling quickly and want a generous free tier (1,000 subscribers)
choose_b_if: You prioritize simplicity and ease of use over advanced features
You want RSS-to-email functionality or AMP email support
You're a blogger or solopreneur with modest email volume needs

faq.a: Moosend generally offers better value with unlimited emails, more robust automation, and lower starting prices. However, AWeber may be better for users prioritizing simplicity. Your choice depends on whether you need advanced features or prefer an intuitive, straightforward interface.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or AWeber?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month versus AWeber's $15/month. Additionally, Moosend's free plan supports 1,000 subscribers compared to AWeber's 500, making it more cost-effective for growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and imports. Most email marketing platforms, including Moosend, allow you to import contacts from AWeber. We recommend exporting your list and automation sequences, then rebuilding workflows in Moosend if needed.
